rag_rules: Place AGREE contracts in component type scopes for visible ports, and in implementation scopes for implementation-level bindings.
Use annex agree {** ... **}; blocks for AGREE contract syntax.
generic_rules: Component type contracts should reference only visible features; implementation bindings should be in implementation scopes.
Guarantees should relate visible outputs to visible inputs in type-level contracts.
AGREE constants and equations must use valid scalar types: int, real, bool.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE syntax uses assume, guarantee, eq, const, and assign within annex blocks.
Ensure type declarations match expression types (bool, int, real).
anti_patterns: Do not reference subcomponent ports or implementation-only paths in component type annexes.
Avoid placing implementation-level bindings in component type scopes.
irrelevant_topics: AGREE validator diagnostics and repair patterns
